instruction: Add 8-direction axis projection as metadata on top of the stable soft meta-domain system. Do not use direction to suppress participation.

new_model.purpose: project each window motion into a directional signature while preserving soft overlap

code_changes.name: direction_8way
compute_axis_projection_8way
code_changes.code:
def compute_axis_projection_8way(delta, meta, eps=1e-12):
    """
    Project W1/W2/W3 into 8-direction metadata.
    dx = signed window delta
    dy = deviation from balanced meta-domain participation
    """
    delta = np.array(delta, dtype=np.float64)
    meta = np.array(meta, dtype=np.float64)

    baseline = 1.0 / 3.0
    projection = {}

    for i, key in enumerate(['W1', 'W2', 'W3']):
        dx = float(delta[i])
        dy = float(meta[i] - baseline)
        direction = direction_8way(dx, dy, threshold=eps)

        projection[key] = {
            'dx_delta': dx,
            'dy_meta_deviation': dy,
            'direction_8way': direction
        }

    return projection

details: After computing meta_vector, call compute_axis_projection_8way(w_delta, meta_vector).
Store result as axis_projection_8way in each frame result.
Do not use axis_projection_8way to change meta_vector, shell, ch7, or channel ratios.

plot_updates.title: 8-Way Direction Counts
plot_updates.purpose: show which directions dominate for each window

interpretation_rules.N: window participation rising above balanced baseline with little horizontal change
interpretation_rules.S: window participation falling below baseline with little horizontal change
interpretation_rules.E: positive raw motion with near-baseline participation
interpretation_rules.W: negative raw motion with near-baseline participation
interpretation_rules.NC: below threshold / no meaningful directional motion

success_conditions: ch7 intensity remains nonzero and structured
channel ratios remain ratios to the whole
direction metadata does not cause winner-take-all collapse

next_patch_after_success.name: directional_entropy_dof_v1
next_patch_after_success.purpose: Use 8-way direction diversity and recurrence to estimate effective DOF.
